query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, 
  COALESCE(SUM(pms.exactScoreCount), 0) as total_exact_scores,
  COALESCE(SUM(pms.totalBets), 0) as total_bets
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN pool_member_stats pms ON pms.userId = u.id
WHERE u.id = (SELECT id FROM users ORDER BY createdAt ASC LIMIT 1)
GROUP BY u.id, u.name;
